AgentCardConfig.description: Agent identity and capabilities advertised via the A2A Agent Card.

stateTransitionHistory.deprecated:
This capability is not implemented in the A2A v1.0 spec and
was removed. Kept for backward compatibility only — value is ignored.
Default: false.
stateTransitionHistory.description: Enable state transition history capability advertisement.

AgentConfig.description:
Complete agent configuration.

This is what a JSON config file (e.g. `agents/example/config.json`) maps to. All fields are optional — sensible defaults are applied for everything.

configDir.description: Directory containing the agent's config.json file. Populated automatically by the CLI scaffold when a config file path is provided. Used by the materializer for resolving relative paths in memory config.

events.description: Event transport configuration for sideband observability events.

mcp.description: MCP servers to register with OpenCode at startup. Keys are server names, values are local or remote configs.

memory.description: Optional memory configuration for persisting instructions and skills. When present, the materializer writes these to backend-specific paths in the workspace directory during executor initialization.

subAgents.description:
Optional sub-agents to expose as MCP tools via the `a2a-mcp-skillmap` bridge. When present, the parent agent spawns skillmap as a stdio MCP server and registers it under the reserved `a2a-subagents` key in the resolved  {@link  mcp }  map. Sub-agents declared here become callable as ordinary MCP tools by the OpenCode runtime.

When this field is absent or `agents` is empty, the parent skips every sub-agent code path with no side effects.

EventsConfig.description: Event transport configuration for sideband observability events.

httpHeaders.description: Custom HTTP headers sent with every event POST. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

httpTimeout.description: HTTP request timeout in ms for the "http" transport (default: 10_000)

httpUrl.description: HTTP endpoint URL for the "http" transport. Required when transport is "http".

enablePollingFallback.description: Enable polling fallback when SSE fails (default: true)

streamArtifactChunks.description: Stream artifact chunks individually (A2A spec-correct) vs buffer and send single artifact (inspector-compatible). Default: false (buffered).

MemoryConfig.description: Memory configuration for persisting instructions and skills into the agent workspace.

instructions.description: Path to a markdown instructions file. Resolved relative to config directory when relative.

skills.description: Paths to skill directories, each containing a SKILL.md file. Resolved relative to config directory when relative.

McpLocalServerConfig.description: Configuration for a local (stdio) MCP server.

command.description: Command and arguments to launch the server. Values support `${ENV_VAR}` (or `$ENV_VAR`) substitution.

environment.description: Environment variables passed to the spawned process. Values support `${ENV_VAR}` (or `$ENV_VAR`) substitution so secrets stay out of config.json — e.g. `{ "API_KEY": "${MY_API_KEY}" }`.

McpOAuthServerConfig.description: OAuth config for remote MCP servers that require OAuth2 authentication.

clientId.description: OAuth client ID. Omit to attempt dynamic client registration (RFC 7591).

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret (if required by the authorization server)

scope.description: OAuth scopes to request during authorization

McpRemoteServerConfig.description: Configuration for a remote (HTTP/SSE) MCP server.

headers.description: Extra headers sent with every request (e.g. { "Authorization": "Bearer <token>" }). Values support `${ENV_VAR}` (or `$ENV_VAR`) substitution so secrets stay out of config.json — e.g. `{ "Authorization": "Bearer ${LINEAR_API_KEY}" }`.

oauth.description: OAuth authentication config. Set to false to disable OAuth auto-detection.

url.description: URL of the remote MCP server (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8080/sse)

McpServerConfig.description: Union of local and remote MCP server configs.

OpenCodeConfig.description: How the wrapper connects to and interacts with OpenCode.

contextFile.description: Filename for the pre-built domain context file in the workspace directory. Default: "context.md"

contextPrompt.description: Default prompt sent to OpenCode to build the domain context file. The LLM will write its findings to the contextFile in the workspace. Agent-specific: e.g. "Explore the workspace, list all files, summarise what each module does."

projectDirectory.description: Target project directory for all OpenCode API calls

systemPrompt.description: System prompt prepended to the first message of every session. Use this to give the LLM its persona, role, and behavioral rules.

systemPromptMode.description:
How the system prompt is applied when injected into the first user message.

- "append" (default): system prompt is injected as-is before the first user message.

- "replace": a production-ready preamble is automatically prepended to your prompt   that prevents tool/internals disclosure and enforces clean agent persona.   Use this for production deployments.

advertiseHost.description: Hostname advertised in agent card URLs (default: "localhost"). Set to machine IP or "host.containers.internal" for Docker.

advertiseProtocol.description: Protocol used in advertised URLs (default: "http"). Set to "https" when the agent is deployed behind TLS or a TLS-terminating reverse proxy. The A2A spec requires HTTPS for production deployments.

cleanupInterval.description: Session cleanup interval in ms (default: 300_000 = 5 min)

reuseByContext.description: Reuse sessions by A2A contextId (default: true)

sessionMapFile.description: Path to a JSON file for persisting the contextId→sessionId mapping across restarts. When set, the map is loaded on startup and written on every update. When absent, the mapping is in-memory only (default behavior).

SkillConfig.description: A single skill exposed on the agent card.

healthCheck.description: Health check interval in ms (default: 30_000). 0 to disable.

pollingInterval.description: Polling interval in ms for fallback (default: 2_000)

prompt.description: Timeout for a single prompt in ms (default: 300_000 = 5 min)

SubAgentAuthConfig.description: Outbound credentials the bridge presents when calling a remote A2A sub-agent.

SubAgentConfig.description: One remote A2A agent exposed as MCP tools via the bridge.

agentCardUrl.description: URL of the sub-agent's A2A agent card (http: or https:).

auth.description: Outbound credentials presented when calling this sub-agent.

endpointUrlOverride.description: Optional override URL the bridge probes instead of agentCardUrl.

name.description: Stable identifier (ASCII letters, digits, hyphens, underscores). Becomes prefix on generated MCP tool names.

SubAgentsConfig.description: Top-level sub-agents configuration. When absent or agents is empty, all sub-agent code paths are skipped.

agents.description: Remote A2A agents to expose as MCP tools via the bridge.

probeTimeoutMs.description: Probe timeout in ms for startup reachability checks (default: 5000).

syncBudgetMs.description: Sync budget in ms passed to the bridge. 0 to wait indefinitely (default: 30000).
